title: Podman frequently restarts all containers
body:
### Issue Description

Podman on RHEL 9.4 frequently restarts all containers. System refresh event is generated at the time of restart. Container lifespan lasts no more than 1day.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Cannot reproduce on other hosts.

### Describe the results you received

```
$ podman events --since 60m --filter type=system
2024-08-28 09:11:27.721458358 -0700 PDT system refresh
$ who -b
system boot  2024-08-15 15:11
```
Time mismatch indicates system refresh is not caused by system reboot.

### Describe the results you expected

Containers should be stable.
